game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **ノベルズローグ ～異世界古書堂と封印の魔女～ (Novels Rogue ~Otherworld Old Bookstore and the Sealed Witch~):** Novels Rogue is a roguelike deck-building card game where players delve into procedurally generated dungeons, with each run resetting their deck. Players engage in turn-based combat, tapping to select cards from their hand and targeting enemies, with victory allowing them to choose one new card from three options to build their current run's deck. The game features four distinct combat systems, determined by the chosen "book": "Total Attack" where all characters use a single card, "Hamiel Counter" utilizing a built gauge for powerful actions, "Devisoul" for mana substitution, and "Sorcery" allowing up to three unique, once-per-combat spells. Progression involves completing dungeon runs across different "books" to unlock new cards for the global pool, increase heroine affection by gifting treasures, and fill a card encyclopedia, with an optional difficulty increase system for enhanced challenge and rewards. A run concludes upon clearing all dungeon floors and defeating the boss, or upon all player characters' HP reaching zero, necessitating a fresh start.
game_info.description: You are a card battler exploring a mysterious dungeon! Each floor presents enemies that you must defeat using cards from your hand. Select cards strategically, target enemies, and watch the turn-based combat unfold. Defeat all enemies on a floor to advance deeper. After victory, choose one of three new cards to strengthen your deck for the current run. Reach the boss on floor 5 and defeat it to win! If your HP reaches zero, the run ends and you must start fresh.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (Left/Right): Navigate through card selection and menu options
Arrow Keys (Up/Down): Switch between targets during combat
Space: Confirm card selection or menu choice
Z: Cancel current selection (return to hand selection)
Enter: Start the game from the main menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart from game over screen (returns to main menu)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game mechanics including card selection, targeting, and combat resolution. Validates that the player can successfully engage in combat, defeat enemies, and progress through floors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Automatically selects the highest attack card available in hand, targets the enemy with the lowest HP first to reduce incoming damage. After combat, randomly selects one of the three offered cards to build the deck.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test should successfully complete multiple combat encounters, advance through at least 2-3 floors, and handle card selection and reward phases correctly. Success is measured by proper state transitions and no errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete win condition by attempting to reach and defeat the final boss on floor 5. This validates the entire progression system, deck building, and combat mechanics working together.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Uses an optimal strategy: prioritizes high-damage attack cards, focuses fire on weakest enemies first, and selects cards that maximize damage output during rewards. Manages resources carefully to survive until the boss fight.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test should successfully complete all 5 floors, defeat the boss, and trigger the GAME_OVER_WIN state. Success is achieved when the game reaches the win screen with the boss defeated.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests the lose condition by intentionally playing poorly to reach zero HP. Validates that the game properly handles player defeat and transitions to the game over state.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Selects the weakest cards available, delays actions, and makes suboptimal targeting choices. This ensures the player takes maximum damage and eventually loses all HP.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The test should result in the player's HP reaching zero, triggering GAME_OVER_LOSE state. The game should display the appropriate game over screen and allow restart.
